ai_summary: Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals Limited (MRPL) has announced the cessation of Shri Dheeraj Kumar Ojha as a Government Nominee Director, effective July 11, 2026. His departure is attributed to a routine re-posting from the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas to another Ministry. This is a standard regulatory disclosure regarding a procedural board change, with no apparent material negative impact or red flags related to company performance or governance.
